criteria_results.description: On mobile devices, users with role 'TECH' cannot see or open LayerPanel or PropertiesPanel sidebars.
criteria_results.evidence: In client/src/pages/home.tsx, the 'isMobile' block only renders Canvas and MobileBottomBar, omitting LayerPanel and PropertiesPanel. Accessing these panels on mobile is further blocked by role-based conditional rendering in MobileBottomBar.tsx (e.g., ChevronUp button hidden for TECH).

criteria_results.description: Object dragging and resizing (react-rnd) is disabled for TECH role on mobile.
criteria_results.evidence: In client/src/components/editor/Canvas/ObjectRenderer.tsx, the Rnd component has disableDragging={isTech || ...} and enableResizing={isTech ? {} : ...}, where {} disables all handles.

criteria_results.description: The 'Color by Status' feature is accessible to TECH users on mobile via the UI.
criteria_results.evidence: MobileBottomBar.tsx (lines 100-108) renders a 'By status' checkbox that is not restricted by isTech.

criteria_results.description: PM users on mobile can edit the 'name' (label) field of a selected object.
criteria_results.evidence: In MobileBottomBar.tsx, the name Input is 'disabled={isTech}'. Since PM users are not TECH, they can edit it.

criteria_results.description: PM users on mobile can view and add photos via the ObjectPhotoGallery component.
criteria_results.evidence: ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx renders an add photo button that is disabled for isTech. PMs can use it. It also renders the gallery for all users.

criteria_results.description: The EditorObject type in types.ts includes an optional 'comments' string or string array.
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/lib/types.ts (line 38) includes 'comments?: string[];' in the EditorObject interface.

criteria_results.description: Drawing mode is forced to 'select' and tool selection is disabled for TECH role on mobile.
criteria_results.evidence: Canvas.tsx (lines 40-44) forces the tool to 'select' if isTech is true. Toolbar selection is hidden on mobile in home.tsx.
